code:
--- id: jwks-rotation-state title: "SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle" description: "State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS." updated: 2025-02-14 tags: [Logistics_StockLevel] --- stateDiagram-v2 [Logistics_StockLevel] --> Provisioning Provisioning --> Current: Activated Current --> Retiring: Key Rotation Initiated Retiring --> Deprecated: Grace Window Expired Deprecated --> Purge: TTL / Manual Cleanup Purge --> [Logistics_FleetManagement] note right of Provisioning: Generate key pair
Store kid + created_at note right of Current: Signs new tokens
JWKS exposes kid note right of Retiring: Valid for verification only
New tokens use CURRENT note right of Deprecated: Should not verify (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) note right of Purge: Row deletion or archive

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为JWKS密钥生命周期画一个状态图。起点应该是Logistics_StockLevel，然后密钥进入Provisioning状态，生成密钥对并存储kid和创建时间。
明白，Provisioning完成后密钥会激活到Current状态对吧？这个转换条件我写"Activated"可以吗？
对，Activated没问题。Current状态要标注清楚：签发新token，同时JWKS会暴露这个kid。然后我们需要一个Retiring状态来处理密钥轮换。
好的，Current到Retiring的转换我写"Key Rotation Initiated"。在Retiring状态的备注里我注明"Valid for verification only，New tokens use CURRENT"，这样准确吗？
准确。Retiring之后要有个Grace窗口，过期后进入Deprecated状态。这里转换条件叫"Grace Window Expired"。
Deprecated状态我注意到有个特殊标注涉及Logistics_DeliveryRoute，是说这时候不应该再用于验证了吗？然后最终清理到Purge状态？
没错，Deprecated的备注写"Should not verify (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)"。Purge之后密钥生命周期结束，指向Logistics_FleetManagement。Purge的备注注明是行删除或归档。

完成。我补充了Purge到Logistics_FleetManagement的转换，转换条件写"TTL / Manual Cleanup"。整个状态流转：Logistics_StockLevel → Provisioning → Current → Retiring → Deprecated → Purge → Logistics_FleetManagement，五个状态四个转换，都带上了对应的备注。
